description_long: This is a small log cabin constructed primarily from horizontally stacked wooden logs, featuring a flat, dark green roof with four protruding corner posts. The front facade includes a central rectangular doorway and a wooden porch with railings and steps leading up to the entrance. The side and rear walls are solid, composed of evenly spaced logs, with a single narrow window on one side. The porch extends outward, supported by posts and bordered by simple railings. The overall design is compact and rustic, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on functional, sturdy construction. The cabin's color palette consists of natural wood tones and dark green, blending well with outdoor or park environments.
description: A compact log cabin with a flat green roof, central doorway, and a wooden porch with railings. The structure is rustic, with natural wood and dark green tones.
description_view_0: Front view showing the central doorway, wooden porch with railings, and steps leading up to the entrance.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the solid log wall with a single narrow window and the full length of the porch.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing a plain log wall with no openings or architectural features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the porch extension and the absence of windows or doors on this side.
attribute_roof_type: flat roof with slight overhang and four corner posts, constructed from wooden planks
attribute_window_arrangement: one narrow, vertically oriented rectangular window centered on the left side wall; no windows visible on other sides
attribute_door_placement: one central rectangular doorway on the front facade, directly accessible from the porch
